feedback.text: With the time now, I am happy that I can still express my opinion and that it can steer the future towards a direction that aligns with my vision... That said, it seems that the concept of buying and maintaining ownership over what has been bought is no longer possible for digital products. This is absurd, as even in cases where the service was designed to operate fully online (not allowing full operation once servers have been switched off) small parts could be created, even if very small, even if only to justify the money spent on it.
